Preview several directions, then choose one before rendering.

## Slide 2

OfficeIMO.PowerPoint

OFFICEIMO

Design brief

Generated alternatives

The caller can inspect direction, mood, density, fonts, colors, and recommendation reasons.

Field Proof

- • Score: 6
- • SplitComplementary / VisualFirst
- • Energetic / Geometric
- • Poppins + Aptos

Board Story

- • Score: 0
- • SplitComplementary / VisualFirst
- • Corporate / Soft
- • Georgia + Aptos

Quiet Appendix

- • Score: 0
- • SplitComplementary / VisualFirst
- • Minimal / Minimal
- • Aptos Display + Aptos

Structured

- • Score: 3
- • SplitComplementary / VisualFirst
- • Corporate / Geometric
- • Poppins + Lato

Recommendations are explainable, not hidden template magic.

## Slide 3

OfficeIMO.PowerPoint

OFFICEIMO

Design brief

Caller workflow

Keep the API simple while preserving room for different visual outcomes.

1

Describe

Create deterministic alternatives from brand, seed, and purpose.

2

Recommend

Rank alternatives against explicit design preferences.

3

Select

Use the chosen alternative index for the deck composer.

4

Compose

Mix semantic slides with raw composition primitives.

## Slide 4

OfficeIMO.PowerPoint

OFFICEIMO

Recommended

Selected direction

Field Proof

Reason 1

- • Matches preferred mood: Energetic.

Reason 2

- • Matches preferred visual style: Geometric.

Reason 3

- • Matches preferred density: Balanced.

Reason 4

- • Exploratory variety allows broader directions when more visual distance is useful.

6

preference score

1

selected option

5

reasons

Energetic mood, Geometric visuals, Poppins headings. Change only the alternative index to render a different direction.
